'''Mal'aa''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who owned and operated [[Mal'aa's Kitchens]] at the [[Kala'uun Starport]] on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. She had been outcast from her original clan and cooked meals for [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] to earn enough [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to survive. One spacer gave her a large gift of credits to open Mal'aa's Kitchens. She was known for her hospitality throughout the region.
